title: Cobbled Dirt
description: Allows you to craft dirt by combining dirt and cobblestone
body:
# **Cobbled Dirt Datapack**  

*Turn cobblestone into a useful resource with the Cobbled Dirt Datapack! This simple tweak allows you to craft dirt using cobblestone, making it easier to gather soil for your projects.*  

## **Crafting Recipe:**  
**2 Dirt + 2 Cobblestone = 4 Dirt**  
![Dirt craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59b18932c2022007899caf509d4ef9afd4e70b22.png)

### **How to Install:**  
1. Download the Cobbled Dirt Datapack.  
2. Place the downloaded file into the "datapacks" folder inside your Minecraft world save.  
3. Start crafting and repurpose your cobblestone into valuable dirt!  

### **Compatibility:**  
- Works seamlessly with other datapacks.  
- No additional mods or dependencies required.  

### **Why Use This Datapack?**  
Gathering dirt can be tedious, but with this datapack, you can use excess cobblestone to create it efficiently. Whether you're expanding farmland or shaping terrain, this recipe helps you get the resources you need without digging up large areas.  

**Download the Cobbled Dirt Datapack now and make dirt easier to obtain!**
